architecture_fit.note: Single attention head pooling A+B + 2-unit ReLU bump — minimal delta from base_model.py that exactly computes XOR.

baseline_comparison.note: Beats the best-linear-probe floor at every marginal and contrasts against a one-ReLU ablation that collapses to the linear floor.

faithfulness.note: Built-in ablation knocks out one ReLU and the swept accuracy collapses onto baseline — direct causal evidence the XOR lives in the ReLU MLP.

operating_range.note: Accuracy 1.0 across the full p=0.1..0.9 marginal sweep; exact circuit so no edge degradation.

hardcoded_weights_bonus.note: Entirely hand-set weights (no training); every channel assignment documented and reproduces XOR exactly.

visual_judgement.note: Demo exposes attention weights, pooled s, bump logit, truth table, and a circuit-vs-ablation bar chart on a shared axis — claim is legible at a glance.

visualisation_rationale.note: README ties the bar chart and per-cell logits directly to the non-separable band the second ReLU carves out and the linear baseline.

notes: A clean, exemplary hand-built XOR circuit: one attention head pools A+B and a two-unit ReLU bump selects the s==1 band, hitting 1.0 accuracy and full xor_robustness across the whole marginal sweep. The built-in single-ReLU ablation collapses back to the linear-probe floor, giving direct causal evidence the non-linearity carries the XOR. Strong on every rubric axis including the hardcoded-weights bonus and a legible, well-justified visualisation.
